title: CSS Architecture Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of CSS architecture methodologies: BEM, ITCSS, CUBE CSS, and when to use each approach
referenceSolutions: BEM uses Block__Element--Modifier naming to manage specificity

validationRules.message: Select the correct answer about CSS architecture

hints.text: CSS architecture methodologies provide naming conventions and organization strategies to manage specificity and maintainability at scale.
BEM uses Block__Element--Modifier pattern. ITCSS organizes by specificity layers. CUBE CSS uses Composition, Utility, Block, Exception.
BEM (Block Element Modifier) separates concerns with clear naming: .block__element--modifier. It prevents specificity wars by keeping selectors flat and predictable.
